title: Science Explainer Panoramic 2 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: ultra-wide science explainer built around evolution of deep sea exploration. Subject: evolution of deep sea exploration is the central educational subject, visualized as a clear left-to-right knowledge journey. Scene: A premium museum-grade information panel showing left-to-right progression from diving bells, brass helmets, bathyscaphe, ROVs, submersibles, and autonomous ocean drones, with clean annotation lanes and structured stage separation. Composition: Fixed horizontal 3:1 science exhibition panel with left-to-right progression, strong information hierarchy, and enough negative space for labels. Style: Premium science museum infographic with rational structure, polished editorial clarity, crisp diagram elements, and restrained annotations. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: FIELD NOTES appears as the main exhibition title; labels for depth markers, vehicle silhouettes, pressure notes, timeline ticks, ocean layers, and concise museum labels stay short, factual, readable, and evenly spaced. Signature Elements: evolution of deep sea exploration, FIELD NOTES, left-to-right progression from diving bells, brass helmets, bathyscaphe, ROVs, submersibles, and autonomous ocean drones, and depth markers, vehicle silhouettes, pressure notes, timeline ticks, ocean layers, and concise museum labels define the reusable science-explainer mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Science Explainer Panoramic 2 Field Notes

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: ultra-wide science explainer built around life cycle of a coffee bean. Subject: life cycle of a coffee bean is the central educational subject, visualized as a clear left-to-right knowledge journey. Scene: A premium museum-grade information panel showing left-to-right path from flower, green cherry, ripe cherry, drying, roasting, grinding, brewing, and tasting, with clean annotation lanes and structured stage separation. Composition: Fixed horizontal 3:1 science exhibition panel with left-to-right progression, strong information hierarchy, and enough negative space for labels. Style: Premium science museum infographic with rational structure, polished editorial clarity, crisp diagram elements, and restrained annotations. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: AFTER RAIN appears as the main exhibition title; labels for plant diagrams, bean cross-sections, roast color scale, brewing icons, aroma notes, and concise labels stay short, factual, readable, and evenly spaced. Signature Elements: life cycle of a coffee bean, AFTER RAIN, left-to-right path from flower, green cherry, ripe cherry, drying, roasting, grinding, brewing, and tasting, and plant diagrams, bean cross-sections, roast color scale, brewing icons, aroma notes, and concise labels define the reusable science-explainer mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.
